productDisplayName: Newhide Black Unisex Travel Pouch Passport Holder
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this travel pouch from Newhide is an essential while keeping organised during travel. Ensure all your important items are organised and arranged in this piece. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to the ambience, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance. Carry your essentials with ease in this classic holder.Dimensions: 23 cm X 10 cmWarranty: 1 yearLeather upper with a zipperThree pockets on the right with one buttoned slotEight card holders, a zippered pocket, and two slots on the rightA loop for ease of handlingBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
